content_blocks.text:
Your knowledge base has one note on this, ingested 2026-01-01 (source #1). It says:

- The internal deployment tool is called **Skiff**.
- `skiff release` cuts a production release.
- Skiff does a **rolling deploy with automatic health checks**, and **rolls back automatically if error rates rise**.

That's the extent of what's stored — a single short note, so treat it as a starting point rather than complete documentation. If you have fuller docs (runbook, config reference, rollback thresholds), ingest them and I can build a proper wiki page for Skiff.
